template:
set -eu
mkdir -p 'out/rcorrector_work'
normalize_fastq_output() { src="$1"; dest="$2"; case "$src" in *.gz) mv -- "$src" "$dest" ;; *) gzip -c -- "$src" > "$dest" ;; esac; }
run_rcorrector.pl -t 1 -od 'out/rcorrector_work' -1 'reads_R1.fastq.gz' -2 'reads_R2.fastq.gz'
find 'out/rcorrector_work' -type f \( -name '*.cor.fq' -o -name '*.cor.fastq' -o -name '*.cor.fq.gz' -o -name '*.cor.fastq.gz' \) > 'out/rcorrector_work/corrected_outputs.unsorted'
LC_ALL=C sort 'out/rcorrector_work/corrected_outputs.unsorted' > 'out/rcorrector_work/corrected_outputs.list'
rm -f 'out/rcorrector_work/corrected_outputs.unsorted'
actual_outputs=$(wc -l < 'out/rcorrector_work/corrected_outputs.list' | tr -d '[:space:]')
if [ "$actual_outputs" -ne 2 ]; then echo "expected 2 corrected outputs in 'out/rcorrector_work' but found $actual_outputs" >&2; exit 64; fi
normalize_fastq_output "$(sed -n '1p' 'out/rcorrector_work/corrected_outputs.list')" 'out/reads_r1.fastq.gz'
normalize_fastq_output "$(sed -n '2p' 'out/rcorrector_work/corrected_outputs.list')" 'out/reads_r2.fastq.gz'
printf '%s\n' '{"schema_version":"bijux.fastq.correct_errors.report.v2","stage":"fastq.correct_errors","stage_id":"fastq.correct_errors","tool_id":"rcorrector","paired_mode":"paired_end","threads":1,"correction_engine":"rcorrector","quality_encoding":"phred33","kmer_size":null,"musket_kmer_budget":null,"genome_size":null,"max_memory_gb":null,"trusted_kmer_artifact":null,"conservative_mode":false,"input_r1":"reads_R1.fastq.gz","input_r2":"reads_R2.fastq.gz","output_r1":"out/reads_r1.fastq.gz","output_r2":"out/reads_r2.fastq.gz","report_json":"out/correct_report.json","corrected_reads":null,"reads_in":null,"reads_out":null,"bases_in":null,"bases_out":null,"pairs_in":null,"pairs_out":null,"mean_q_before":null,"mean_q_after":null,"kmer_fix_rate":null,"correction_effect":null,"runtime_s":null,"memory_mb":null,"exit_code":null,"raw_backend_report":null,"raw_backend_report_format":null,"backend_metrics":null}' > 'out/correct_report.json'
